ADRASAMEN.ManaExhausted: {name} has exhausted their mana and falls unconscious!
ADRASAMEN.InsufficientMana: Insufficient mana to perform this action.
ADRASAMEN.InsufficientHealth: Insufficient health to perform this action.
ADRASAMEN.VulnerableSoulDescription: Your soul is exposed and vulnerable due to mana exhaustion. You are more susceptible to magical effects and spiritual damage.
ADRASAMEN.ManaAdvanced: {name} advances their mana capacity! Gained {added} max mana (now {newMax}).

ManaPoints.Label: Mana Points
ManaPoints.Title: Mana Points
ManaPoints.Hint: Gain mana points when leveling up using a customizable formula
ManaPoints.ManaDieHint: The die rolled when gaining mana points (e.g., 1d4, 1d6)
ManaPoints.FormulaHint: Complete formula: Mana Die + Maximum Affinity Level. Configure this in your class item details.
ManaPoints.FlowHint: Gain mana points for level {level}. Roll {die} + {bonus} (Max Affinity Level).
ManaPoints.InvalidDie: Invalid mana die format. Use format like '1d4' or '1d6'.
ManaPoints.OnlyOneAllowed: Each class can only have one Mana Points advancement.
